initiatives.name: DSA Nebraska
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through democratic socialist organizing across Nebraska. They coordinate direct support, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through collective organizing and community care.

initiatives.name: OutNebraska
initiatives.description: A statewide organization fostering mutual aid and community power through LGBTQ+ advocacy and support across Nebraska. They coordinate resource sharing, community organizing, and solidarity networks while building power through policy advocacy, education, and creating spaces for queer and trans liberation.

initiatives.name: Nebraska Appleseed
initiatives.description: A statewide organization fostering mutual aid and community power through legal advocacy and grassroots organizing across Nebraska. They coordinate policy initiatives, community organizing, and solidarity networks while building power through economic justice, healthcare access, immigrant rights, and creating systemic change for all Nebraskans.

initiatives.name: Nebraska AIDS Project
initiatives.description: A statewide organization fostering mutual aid and community care through HIV/AIDS support services and sexual health advocacy across Nebraska. They coordinate HIV testing, PrEP access, case management, and solidarity networks while building power through education, healthcare access, and creating spaces for people impacted by HIV/AIDS to thrive.

initiatives.name: Norfolk Area Pride
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support through LGBTQ+ advocacy and services in Northeast Nebraska. They coordinate community education, support networks, and solidarity initiatives while building power through LGBTQ+ visibility, safety awareness, and creating spaces for queer and trans people to thrive in rural Nebraska.

initiatives.name: Nebraska Abortion Resources
initiatives.description: Together with our allies and partners, we meet people right where they are and work to remove barriers on every level for Nebraskans seeking abortion access. We provide financial and practical support for those seeking abortion care.
